rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0010
rows.name:
We did it, mo! We launched
all the spears, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0020
rows.name:
Now we'll have the upper hand
against Void, won't we.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0030
rows.name: Yes. This time, we won't fall behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0040
rows.name:
We'll defeat Void and
take back the Ares core.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33450110_MSG0050
rows.name:
Once we're ready, let's
begin our counterattack.[ST:wait ]
